cards - Variable in class model.Player
The list of cards the player holds.

Sets the list of cards the player has.

checkHands() - Method in class model.ModelManager
Checks the hands of all players and determines the outcome of the game.
checkSave() - Method in class controller.LoadGameController
This method checks if a save file exists at the specified file path.
choiceOfHand(Player) - Method in class model.ModelManager
Determines whether a player should take another card based on their hand value.
CLUBS - Enum constant in enum class model.BJCards.CardSuits
 
controller - package controller

Singleton class responsible for managing the controllers in the application.

Private constructor to initialize the controllers.
countCards() - Method in class model.BJCards
Gets the number of cards remaining in the deck.

Method to create an opponent player.
createSaveGame(GamePanel) - Method in class controller.NewGamePanelController
Method to create a save game.
createTheGame(Integer) - Method in class controller.NewGamePanelController
Method to create a new game with specified number of opponents.
